content.speakerText: I messed up the report—I sent the wrong version.
content.speakerTextCn: 我搞砸了报告，发错版本了。

options.text: Ugh, that’s rough—but can you resend it by 3?
Why didn’t you check before sending?

content.explanation: 正确答案 Ugh, that’s rough—but can you resend it by 3? 体现了对失误的共情（Ugh, that’s rough）并立即提出解决方案（resend by 3），符合场景要求。其他选项要么轻描淡写（That’s fine）、要么指责对方（Why didn’t you...）、要么模糊承诺（I’ll handle it），均未体现‘道歉后立即给出解决方案’的核心策略。

content.speakerText: I’ll make it up to you—next team lunch’s on me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我一定补偿你，下次团队聚餐我请。

options.text: I don’t need compensation, just don’t do it again.
Deal! But no more mistakes, okay?
Thanks, but I’m busy next week.

content.explanation: 正确答案 Deal! But no more mistakes, okay? 既接受了补偿（Deal!），又用幽默语气设定了边界（no more mistakes），符合‘补偿要具体+语气带点幽默’的要求。其他选项要么拒绝补偿（I don’t need...）、要么回避话题（I’m on a diet）、要么拒绝邀请（I’m busy），均未体现积极回应和轻松互动的沟通策略。

content.speakerText: Sorry I missed the deadline—I know it caused problems.
content.speakerTextCn: 抱歉我错过了截止日期，我知道这造成了麻烦。

options.text: It’s okay, I’ll do it for you.
I appreciate you taking responsibility. Can you send the corrected version by EOD?

content.explanation: 正确答案 I appreciate you taking responsibility. Can you send the corrected version by EOD? 既肯定了对方的道歉（appreciate responsibility），又明确提出了下一步行动（send by EOD），符合职场沟通的建设性原则。其他选项要么替对方解决问题（I’ll do it for you）、要么假设问题已解决（I’ve already fixed it）、要么攻击对方（You always...），均不符合道歉后应建立解决方案的沟通逻辑。

content.template: I’m so sorry—I’ll fix it right away and add a ______.
content.hint: 道歉后提出解决方案时常用词，指补充说明内容

content.template: I’ll make it up to you—next team lunch’s on ______.
content.hint: 表示‘我请客’的固定表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（on me = 我付费）

content.template: Sorry for the delay—I’ll send the updated file by ______.
content.hint: 职场中表示‘今天下班前’的常用缩写
content.knowledgePoint: 职场缩略语（EOD = End of Day）

content.speakerText: I messed up the report—I sent the wrong version.
content.speakerTextCn: 我搞砸了报告，发错版本了。
expectedAnswers: I'm really sorry—I'll resend the correct one by 3 PM and include a changelog.
Oh no, that’s frustrating. Can you send the right file ASAP?
No worries—I’ve got a backup. Just fix it before the meeting.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了歉意并提出解决方案或明确请求
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用了场景关键词（resend, fix, version）
表达自然度：是否符合职场口语习惯，语气是否得体
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个场景关键词（如：resend, fix, correct, deadline）

content.speakerText: I’ll make it up to you—next team lunch’s on me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我一定补偿你，下次团队聚餐我请。
expectedAnswers: Deal! But next time, double-check the attachments, okay?
That’s so kind of you—I really appreciate it.
Awesome! Just promise me you’ll use version control from now on!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了补偿提议，是否带出后续期望
语言准确性：是否正确使用了补偿相关表达（on me, make it up to you）
表达自然度：语气是否轻松、有幽默感或真诚感谢，避免生硬
关键词覆盖：是否使用了补偿或幽默相关的关键词（deal, promise, next time, version control）

content.speakerText: I’m really sorry—I forgot to submit the timesheet and now HR is upset.
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很抱歉，我忘了提交工时表，现在HR很不高兴。
expectedAnswers: I understand—it happens. Can you submit it right away and email HR to apologize?
No problem—I’ll cover for you. Just make sure it’s done today.
That’s stressful. Want me to help you draft an apology email to HR?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了理解并主动提供支持或明确下一步行动
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的道歉回应句型（I understand, Can you..., Want me to...）
表达自然度：语气是否同理、支持性强，避免冷漠或过度指责
关键词覆盖：是否包含场景关键词（submit, apologize, HR, timesheet）
